title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Spiral Review
summary: Operate a reusable repository template without letting gates rot or overwhelm contributors. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a reusable quality-gated repository template after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure defect escape, false positives, duration, flakiness, suppression age, and developer friction.
Schedule compatibility-tested tool and runtime upgrades with rollback paths.
Raise standards gradually with changed-code gates and expiring debt records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Quality Metrics · changed case

stimulus.title: Capstone Defense case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates maintenance. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A fashionable tool list is a quality strategy.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend each gate by risk, ownership, feedback time, evidence, and maintenance plan. Artifact under review: a reusable quality-gated repository template.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Capstone Defense, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Capstone Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend each gate by risk, ownership, feedback time, evidence, and maintenance plan.
